name: graphql-aggregation-service
description: GraphQL gateway aggregating multiple REST microservices

scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,users,orders,products -c cyan,green,yellow,magenta "pnpm --filter gateway dev" "pnpm --filter user-service dev" "pnpm --filter order-service dev" "pnpm --filter product-service dev"
scripts.build:services: pnpm --filter user-service build && pnpm --filter order-service build && pnpm --filter product-service build
scripts.seed: pnpm --filter user-service seed && pnpm --filter order-service seed && pnpm --filter product-service seed
scripts.prisma:migrate: pnpm --filter user-service prisma:migrate && pnpm --filter order-service prisma:migrate && pnpm --filter product-service prisma:migrate
